title: An Ordinance Implementing the Drug-free Workplace Program, Mandating the Conduct of Authorized Drug Testing by All Offices of the Municipal Government of Los Baños, Laguna, Including the Offices of Its Fourteen (14) Barangays, Providing Funds Therefor and Providing Penalties for Violation Thereof. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 10/07/2020)
